siteTitle: Atlagia DentalCare - All-in-One Dental Management System
siteDescription: Complete dental management solution with integrated AI assistant, patient management, appointments, and comprehensive practice tools.

sections.title: Complete Dental Practice Management
sections.description: Streamline your dental practice with our all-in-one system. Featuring integrated AI assistant, patient management, appointment scheduling, and comprehensive treatment planning tools for modern dental practices.

sections.subtitle: ABOUT OUR SYSTEM
sections.title: Modern Dental Practice Management
sections.description: Atlagia DentalCare Pro is a comprehensive dental practice management system designed to streamline your operations, enhance patient care, and boost practice efficiency. Our platform combines cutting-edge technology with user-friendly interfaces to transform how dental practices operate.

features.title: Simplified Practice Management
features.description: Handle appointments, patient records, billing, and staff scheduling all in one intuitive interface.

features.title: AI-Powered Diagnostics
features.description: Our AI assistant helps identify potential issues from X-rays and images, suggesting appropriate treatments.

features.title: Patient Engagement Tools
features.description: Automatic appointment reminders, customized care instructions, and a secure patient portal for better communication.

features.title: Comprehensive Analytics
features.description: Track practice performance, patient retention, and financial metrics with customizable dashboards and reports.
features.icon: <path d='M21 21H3V3' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M21 9L15 15L9 9L3 15' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/>

sections.subtitle: THE TEAM BEHIND THE SYSTEM
sections.title: Dental Experts & Software Engineers Working Together
sections.description: Atlagia DentalCare was developed by a team of dental professionals, software engineers, and AI specialists with a shared vision: to create the most intuitive and powerful dental practice management system. We understand the unique challenges of running a modern dental practice because we've been there.

sections.subtitle: AI-POWERED WORKFLOW
sections.title: Your Clinic's Brain, Now on WhatsApp
sections.description: Delegate your clinic's operations to an intelligent AI assistant. Simply send a command via WhatsApp to manage appointments, access real-time analytics, or analyze patient media. It's a seamless extension of your practice, available 24/7.

features.title: WhatsApp Integration
features.description: Manage your practice on the go. Just send a message.

features.title: Automated Appointments
features.description: Tell the AI to book a patient, and it's done.

features.title: Instant Analytics
features.description: Ask for your daily, weekly, or monthly performance.

features.title: Multimedia Processing
features.description: Analyze patient images, videos, or audio notes instantly.

sections.headline: Empowering Every Dental Practice with Intelligent, Effortless Care
sections.description: At Atlagia, we believe technology should empower—not replace—human expertise. Our platform bridges the gap between advanced AI and compassionate care, making world-class dental management accessible, efficient, and personal for every clinic.

cards.description: AI that supports, not replaces, the expertise of dental professionals.

cards.title: Effortless Workflow
cards.description: Streamlining daily operations so you can focus on patient care.

cards.description: We grow with you, supporting your practice at every step.

sections.subtitle: PLATFORM OVERVIEW
sections.headline: All-in-One Dental Practice Management
sections.description: Streamline your entire dental practice with our comprehensive management system. From appointment scheduling to patient records, billing, and AI-powered diagnosis assistance.

cards.title: Patient Management
cards.description: Comprehensive patient records with medical history, treatment plans, and appointment tracking in one secure system.

cards.title: AI Diagnostic Assistant
cards.description: Advanced AI algorithms to assist with diagnosis, treatment planning, and image analysis for improved patient care.

cards.title: Appointment Scheduling
cards.description: Intelligent scheduling system with automated reminders, online booking, and conflict prevention.
cards.icon: <rect x='3' y='4' width='18' height='18' rx='2' ry='2' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='16' y1='2' x2='16' y2='6' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='8' y1='2' x2='8' y2='6' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='3' y1='10' x2='21' y2='10' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round'/>

cards.title: Billing & Insurance
cards.description: Streamlined billing processes with insurance verification, claim submission, and payment tracking.

cards.title: Dental Imaging
cards.description: Integrated imaging solution for X-rays, intraoral photos, and 3D scans with AI-assisted analysis.

cards.title: Analytics & Reporting
cards.description: Comprehensive analytics dashboard for practice performance, patient trends, and financial insights.

sections.subtitle: SYSTEM FEATURES
sections.title: Why Choose Atlagia DentalCare
sections.description: Our comprehensive dental management system offers powerful tools designed specifically for modern dental practices.

benefits.title: Intelligent Appointment System
benefits.description: Smart scheduling with AI-powered optimization, automated reminders, and online booking capabilities to reduce no-shows by up to 30%.
benefits.icon: <rect x='3' y='4' width='18' height='18' rx='2' ry='2' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='16' y1='2' x2='16' y2='6' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='8' y1='2' x2='8' y2='6' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='3' y1='10' x2='21' y2='10' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round'/><rect x='8' y='14' width='3' height='3' rx='0.5' fill='currentColor'/>

benefits.title: Advanced Patient Management
benefits.description: Comprehensive patient records with complete dental history, treatment plans, digital imaging integration, and secure patient portal access.

benefits.title: AI-Powered Diagnosis
benefits.description: Cutting-edge artificial intelligence that assists in image analysis, treatment planning, and clinical decision support for more accurate diagnoses.

benefits.title: Real-time Analytics
benefits.description: Comprehensive business intelligence with customizable dashboards, KPI tracking, and predictive analytics to optimize practice performance.
benefits.icon: <path d='M21 21H3V3' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M21 9L15 15L9 9L3 15' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/>

benefits.title: Secure Cloud Storage
benefits.description: HIPAA-compliant cloud infrastructure with end-to-end encryption, automated backups, and disaster recovery for complete data security.

benefits.description: Connect with other healthcare systems, insurance providers, and third-party applications through our open API architecture.

reviews.content: The team at DentCare is exceptional. They made my dental experience comfortable and stress-free. The results of my treatment exceeded my expectations!
reviews.author: Sarah Johnson

reviews.content: I've never felt more at ease at a dental office. The staff is friendly, professional, and truly cares about patient comfort. Highly recommend!
reviews.author: Michael Brown

reviews.content: Outstanding dental care! The modern technology and skilled team made my treatment quick and painless. My smile has never looked better!
reviews.author: Emily Davis

sections.subtitle: PRICING PLANS
sections.title: Choose the Right Plan for Your Practice
sections.description: Flexible subscription options designed to fit practices of all sizes. All plans include our core practice management features with varying levels of advanced functionality.

insuranceInfo.text: Our software integrates seamlessly with these major systems

plans.name: Starter
plans.highlightedFeature: Perfect for new or small practices

sections.subtitle: GET STARTED TODAY
sections.title: Transform Your Dental Practice with Atlagia DentalCare
sections.description: Experience how our all-in-one management system can streamline your operations, improve patient care, and increase your practice efficiency with a personalized demo.

sections.subtitle: FREE RESOURCES
sections.title: Enhance Your Practice Management
sections.description: Get exclusive access to guides, webinars, and tools designed to help you maximize efficiency and grow your dental practice with our software.

trustBadge.text: Your information is secure and we'll never share it with third parties
